top_opportunities.title: Meeting transcripts still do not close the loop into action and CRM updates
top_opportunities.problem: Small teams complain that AI meeting tools stop at transcription and still leave manual cleanup, follow-up drafting, and CRM update work.
top_opportunities.target_user: sales teams, founders, small revenue teams
top_opportunities.why_it_matters: High-frequency workflow, strong AI leverage, obvious SEO entry pages like 'meeting notes to CRM' and 'automatic follow-up from call transcript'.

top_opportunities.title: Teams drown in scattered user feedback and cannot turn it into product decisions fast enough
top_opportunities.problem: Founders and PM-adjacent operators complain that feedback from Reddit, X, support tickets, and interviews stays fragmented and too manual to synthesize.
top_opportunities.target_user: indie founders, product-led SaaS teams, agencies
top_opportunities.why_it_matters: Strong AI summarization/extraction fit, but needs sharper niche positioning for SEO-led acquisition.

rejected_examples.title: Parents want better local activity discovery and offline community support
rejected_examples.reason: Pain appears real but distribution and fulfillment skew heavily offline, trust-based, and operations-heavy.
